$comment: Increment-1 game loads: per-shot DISPERSION specs layered on top of the ballistics in validation/loads.json (referenced by baseLoadId, so ballistics stay single-sourced in the oracle fixture). Shared by GameBuild/app/src/game/loads.ts and GameBuild/validation/match-sim-check.mjs so the app and the validation harness use identical numbers. mvSdMps is sourced from Wiki/muzzle-velocity.md; bcSdFraction and rifleAccuracyMoa are PROVISIONAL pending a sourced accuracy-and-dispersion article (see Wiki/_gaps.md). Box values are true in Increment 1. rifleAccuracyMoa is the angular dispersion cone DIAMETER (MOA); consumers convert to radians. scopeCant and all wind SDs are 0 in Increment 1 (mean wind is applied in the deterministic center; gusts arrive in 1.7).
